# Mandatory Reading

Before performing any engineering task:

1. Read docs/00_READ_FIRST.md

2. Read docs/01_PROJECT_MISSION.md

3. Read every Markdown document inside /docs in numerical order.

4. Read the complete document:
docs/DominoMajlisPRO_Official_Engineering_Constitution_v1.md

5. Treat all documentation as the official engineering constitution.

6. If documentation conflicts with implementation, stop and report the conflict before changing code.

7. Do not begin coding until all documents have been read completely.
